facts: 当前规划已把存储决策收敛为：DB-backed blob 仅用于本地/测试/小规模 VPS-A canary；VPS-A 广泛生产使用需 S3-compatible/object storage。证据：`prd.md:22,37-41,91-92`，`design.md:7,60-73`，`object-storage-options.md:7-18`。

VPS 证据支持“不要把 DB blob 当 VPS-A 生产默认”：VPS-A 40G root，超过 90% 可能触发 `system_disk_overloaded`，建议至少 4G free；`new-api.db` 与自动备份都在 VPS-A；`new-api.db`/data/overlay 是高风险清理目标。证据：`vps-capacity-evidence.md:13-27`，VPS runbook `:11-17,:36-37,:143-149`，monitoring `:217-221`。
另一个节点 VPS-E 在 2026-06-02 低风险清理后仍约 `49G total / 45G used / 3.7G available / 93%`，VPS-B 是 1G 级高波动执行层，VPS-D 是私有 OpenClaw 主机；这些都不构成合适的持久创意资产落点。证据：`vps-capacity-evidence.md:19-21`，canary plan `:309-323`。

当前 new-api 只有 `/creative/api` bootstrap/models/preferences/documents 路由，无 `/creative/api/assets`；`CreativeDocument` 只存 `SnapshotJSON`、`MetadataJSON`、revision 等 JSON 字段。证据：`new-api/router/web-router.go:56-69`，`new-api/model/creative.go:57-68`。

当前 Opentu document sync 只构造并清洗 JSON snapshot，然后 create/put 到 `/creative/api/documents`；`flushSnapshot()` 直接调用 document create/put，没有资产上传、outbound URL rewrite 或 hydration。证据：`creative-document-sync.ts:168-179,430-447,470-530,892-915`。

可复用前端基础已存在：`isVirtualMediaUrl()` 覆盖 `/asset-library/`、`/__aitu_cache__/`、`/__aitu_generated__/audio/`；`unifiedCacheService.getCachedBlob()` 可读缓存 blob；`cacheLocalMediaByContent()` 可写 content-addressed local URL。证据：`virtual-media-url.ts:1-39`，`unified-cache-service.ts:1330-1417`。

现有 JSON export/import embedded-media traversal 太窄：只识别 `url/imageUrl/videoUrl/poster/src`，且 local virtual 判断只覆盖 `/__aitu_cache__/` 与 `/asset-library/`，不覆盖规划要求的 `audioUrl/urls[]/thumbnail*/previewImageUrl/coverUrl/clips.*` 与 `/__aitu_generated__/audio/`。证据：`embedded-media.ts:21-23,41-45,104-118,145-170`，规划要求 `prd.md:58-65`、`design.md:139-170,271-274`。

Service Worker 现状需要特别防护：当前 fetch handler 没有 `/creative/api/assets/*` 早期 pass-through；同源 asset content 若作为 video 会命中 video handler，若作为 image/audio/static destination 可能进入 static cache 流程。证据：`sw/index.ts:930-955,4230-4318,4413-4470,4534-4620,5610-5639`；规划已要求 pass-through：`prd.md:61`，`design.md:326-329`，`implement.md:91`。

当前 planning closure 认为 frontend outbound 与 hydration 主体合同已覆盖，但仍记录一个弱措辞风险：`implement.md:99` 的 invalid cloud refs 可 “reject/ignore” 容易误导为静默保存破损引用。证据：`creative-cloud-assets-sync-planning-closure-v2.json:65-73,101,231-234`。

blockingIssues: 方向判断基本正确：若目标是当前 new-api 公网 /creative 跨设备媒体同步，VPS-A 的 40G root、90% 磁盘保护、live DB 与自动备份同盘，决定应升级为 S3-compatible 生产路径；DB-only 只能是 local/test/canary。
当前 Trellis artifacts 仍有硬冲突：prd/design/implement 的拟改内容没有覆盖 research/object-storage-options.md、research/codebase-evidence.md、implement.jsonl、check.jsonl；这些文件仍会把子代理带回 DB-backed MVP / future S3 方案。
“broad production rollout” 仍不可由代码判定：需要明确 rollout mode、kill switch、DB canary allow flag、缺省值和 fail-closed 规则，否则实现很容易在 VPS-A 缺 S3 配置时静默回退 DB。
ObjectKey 文案有潜在自相矛盾：生产必须在 new-api DB 内部持久化 server-only ObjectKey，但 API responses / Opentu snapshots / logs 不能暴露 ObjectKey、bucket URL、signed URL 或 credentials；PRD 必须写清这个例外。
S3 进入 MVP 后，一致性测试仍不足：需要覆盖 S3 Put 成功但 DB insert/metadata transaction 失败、duplicate race 产生 orphan、delete 顺序、object delete 失败、Head 不存在、S3 unhealthy 时不提交可引用 broken asset。
生产代理流量风险未充分落地：new-api 会代理 S3 内容，必须要求 streaming、Range 转发、context cancel、超时和并发/内存上限；否则虽然不吃 root disk，仍可能吃爆 VPS-A 带宽、goroutine 或内存。
R2 可以作为推荐首选，但还不是已批准部署事实；artifact 需要把真实 bucket/secret/provider owner、价格复核、smoke upload/download/range/delete 作为 release gate，而不是 implementation 假设。
requiredArtifactPatches: prd.md：在用户拟替换的 Confirmed product decisions 后追加一句：`Internal server-only exception: new-api may persist an opaque CreativeAsset.ObjectKey in its own DB for StorageBackend=s3, but ObjectKey must be non-URL, non-secret, not content-hash-only, and must never be returned to Opentu, document snapshots, asset API JSON, localStorage, or logs.`

prd.md：新增 Deployment mode requirements：`CREATIVE_ASSET_SYNC_ENABLED=false|true`; `CREATIVE_ASSET_ROLLOUT_MODE=local|canary|production`; `CREATIVE_ASSET_STORAGE=database|s3`. `production` requires `s3` plus complete S3 config and fails closed otherwise. `database` is accepted only for local/test or `canary` with `CREATIVE_ASSET_DB_CANARY_ENABLED=true`, low global/user caps, reserved-free guard, monitoring, and kill switch. The server must never automatically fall back from s3 to database.

prd.md：把 S3 storage requirements 扩展为：private bucket/prefix; credentials least-privilege for PutObject/GetObject/HeadObject/DeleteObject only where possible; no public read; no ListBucket dependency for request path; provider credentials and endpoint secrets are env/deployment secrets only.

prd.md：Acceptance criteria 增加：`[ ] S3 fake/in-process tests cover Put/Get/Head/Range/Delete, object-key opacity, no URL/credential exposure, and no real bucket/network/credentials.`；`[ ] S3 object write + DB metadata failure, duplicate race, delete failure, and missing object cases leave no committed broken referenced asset; any orphan cleanup is non-secret and retryable.`；`[ ] Asset content is streamed through new-api with Range and cancellation without buffering full objects in memory.`

design.md：除用户拟改内容外，把 Storage adapter seam 改为当前范围，并明确接口返回 stream metadata：`Store(...) -> ObjectKey/ETag/size`; `Open(ctx, objectKey, range) -> io.ReadCloser plus size/contentRange/status`; `Head`; `Delete`. Handlers depend only on interface，不能直接依赖 DB 或 S3 SDK。

design.md：新增 consistency ordering：Upload 在 64MiB cap 内用 bounded memory/temp spool 计算 hash/MIME/size；先同用户 dedupe；S3 写入并 Head/size/hash 校验后才提交 DB metadata；DB 提交失败则 best-effort delete object 并记录非秘密 orphan debt；不得先提交可见 S3 row 再补写 object。Delete 对未引用资产先在 DB transaction 中移除可见 row/ref 状态，再 best-effort 删除 object；反向顺序会制造 broken asset，必须禁止。

design.md：把 object key 示例从 raw user-id 改为 opaque owner prefix，例如 `creative-assets/u/<opaque-user-prefix>/<asset-id>/<random>`；禁止 email、username、raw user id、content-hash-only key、public URL 或 provider-specific URL。

design.md：配置列表补齐并统一命名：保留用户列出的 S3/DB env，同时加入 `CREATIVE_ASSET_SYNC_ENABLED`, `CREATIVE_ASSET_ROLLOUT_MODE`, `CREATIVE_ASSET_DB_CANARY_ENABLED`；把旧的 `CREATIVE_ASSET_S3_ACCESS_KEY` / `SECRET_KEY` 统一为 `CREATIVE_ASSET_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID` / `CREATIVE_ASSET_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY`。

final.storageDecision: 生产安全结论：升级 MVP。S3-compatible object storage 必须进入本 child 的生产路径；DB-backed blob 只保留为 local/test 和显式 tiny VPS-A canary/emergency mode。不能把 DB-backed + seam-only 宣称为 current VPS-A broad production ready。
final.scopeDecision: 本任务应从“DB MVP + future S3 seam”改为“generic S3-compatible production adapter + DB local/test/canary fallback”。Opentu 合同不变：只保存 /creative/api/assets/:id/content；new-api 私有鉴权并代理/stream bytes，绝不向前端暴露 bucket URL、signed URL、ObjectKey 或 credentials。
mustPatchArtifacts: .trellis/tasks/06-09-creative-cloud-assets-sync/prd.md：替换第 22 行决策为：2026-06-09 VPS capacity re-plan upgrades MVP scope to include generic S3-compatible object storage for any current VPS-A/public production rollout. DB-backed blob storage remains only local/test and explicitly capped tiny canary/emergency mode. Opentu stores only /creative/api/assets/:id/content; new-api enforces session/owner auth and streams from configured backend. R2 may be preferred deployment candidate, but implementation is generic S3-compatible and must not hard-code provider credentials or bucket URLs.

implementationWorkflowShape: Apply artifact patches only, then validate Trellis planning; do not edit product repos until task.py start.
Phase 0 preflight: record approvedDeploymentTarget, provider-neutral config contract, sibling repo WIP status, OpenSpec gate status, and no real credentials in artifacts.
Phase A backend TDD in new-api: models/migration, storage interface, S3 fake adapter, DB fallback adapter, config fail-closed matrix, auth/nonce/MIME/quota/Range/ref/GC/security tests.
Phase B frontend TDD in opentu: asset prepare/upload/rewrite, sanitizer final guard, no provider secrets, bootstrap assetSyncEnabled gate, SW pass-through tests.
Phase C hydration/cold-start: download new-api content URLs into unifiedCacheService, rewrite local board, revision-aware import, no immediate outbound resync, no broken board save.

Phase D integration/validation: focused Go storage tests, broader Go tests, focused Vitest, SW assertion/build, opentu build:web, production dist regression if build output changes, diff --check across new-api/opentu/new2fly.
Phase E Trellis check: verify S3 production path implemented, DB cannot be mistaken for broad VPS-A production, OpenSpec gate completed/excepted, and rollout/rollback notes are consistent.
preStartGates: Apply the must-patch artifacts and run python3 ./.trellis/scripts/task.py validate 06-09-creative-cloud-assets-sync.
Complete or explicitly except Opentu OpenSpec: add/associate add-creative-cloud-asset-sync and run openspec validate ... --strict before Opentu code edits.
Record approvedDeploymentTarget. If it is vps-a-broad-production/current-public-users, S3-compatible adapter remains mandatory before start; DB-only plan must not start.

Choose provider-neutral implementation contract now; choose actual provider/account/region/bucket/IAM/secret injection before production rollout. Recheck official pricing/limits/TOS at provider freeze; do not rely on stale artifact prices.

Before any VPS-A DB canary enablement, collect same-rollout-window df -h /, df -i /, GET /api/performance/stats disk_space_info, du -sh new-api.db, WAL/SHM if present, and backups/auto. If evidence missing, >=90%, inode risk, low reserve, or caps unset, DB upload stays disabled.
No real access key, secret, bucket credential, signed URL, or provider endpoint secret may be committed to repo, Trellis artifacts, logs, fixtures, snapshots, or frontend state.
Only after patched planning is accepted: task.py start, then implementation/check via Trellis sub-agent workflow with disjoint ownership.
openQuestions: Final deployment provider is still open: Cloudflare R2 can be recommended candidate, but production must wait for official current price/limit/TOS review and owner approval.
Live VPS-A capacity was not sampled in this planning pass; only local docs were inspected.
If the user explicitly redefines MVP as canary-only/dev-test, DB-backed + seam can be a smaller alternate, but it must be labeled not production-ready for current VPS-A broad rollout.
